classes.reason: Reviewed statin class expansion closed over the current cardiometabolic synthetic patient medication vocabulary and cached RxNorm ingredient bindings.
classes.provenance: High-frequency CHIA medication class surfaces include statin/statins; current Synthea cardiometabolic cohort carries atorvastatin and simvastatin as active medication codes.

classes.reason: Reviewed broad lipid-lowering therapy expansion closed over the committed Synthea patient vocabulary, which currently carries atorvastatin and simvastatin representatives.
classes.provenance: Compiler review groups surfaced lipid-lowering treatment/oral-drug criteria as medication-class gaps.

classes.reason: Reviewed bisphosphonate expansion closed over the committed Synthea patient vocabulary, which currently carries alendronic acid.
classes.provenance: Compiler review groups surfaced bisphosphonate treatment as a medication-class gap.

classes.reason: Reviewed RAAS-blocker expansion closed over the committed Synthea patient vocabulary, which currently carries lisinopril and losartan representatives.
classes.provenance: Compiler review groups surfaced RAAS/RASB medication-class criteria as unresolved class surfaces.

classes.reason: Reviewed GLP-1 class expansion closed over the current cardiometabolic synthetic patient medication vocabulary and cached RxNorm ingredient bindings.
classes.provenance: High-frequency diabetes trial surfaces mention GLP-1 class exposure; semaglutide is the current reviewed representative in the project medication bindings.

classes.reason: Reviewed SGLT2 class expansion closed over the current cardiometabolic synthetic patient medication vocabulary and cached RxNorm ingredient bindings.
classes.provenance: High-frequency diabetes trial surfaces mention SGLT2 class exposure; dapagliflozin is the current reviewed representative in the project medication bindings.

classes.reason: Reviewed non-insulin antidiabetic expansion closed over the committed demo medication vocabulary; insulin is intentionally excluded for criteria that say other than insulin.
classes.provenance: Compiler review groups surfaced antidiabetic/non-insulin glucose-lowering medication-class criteria as unresolved class surfaces.
